Title: Search by full product name (Elastic)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Admin > Search
2. Search by full product name
Expected Result: Product found and displayed in results

Title: Search by partial input (few symbols)
Steps: 1. Search by first few characters of product name
Expected Result: Matching products returned in results

Title: Search by multiple words
Steps: 1. Search using multiple words from product name/description
Expected Result: Products matching multi-word query returned

Title: Search with incorrect value - no results
Steps: 1. Search with random/incorrect text
Expected Result: No results returned; appropriate empty state shown

Title: Lucene search by full product name
Steps:
1. Configure Lucene search provider
2. Search by full product name
Expected Result: Product found using Lucene search

Title: Lucene search by partial input
Steps: 1. Search by first few characters
Expected Result: Matching products returned via Lucene

Title: Run index build
Steps:
1. Navigate to Search > Index
2. Click Build/Run Index
3. Wait for completion
Expected Result: Index built successfully; status shows completed

Title: Rebuild index - both indices built
Steps:
1. Navigate to Search Index
2. Click Rebuild
3. Verify both active and inactive indices built
Expected Result: Both indices built successfully; statuses updated

Title: Rebuild index - only active index built
Steps:
1. Build only the active index
2. Verify status
Expected Result: Active index built; inactive index remains unchanged

Title: Swap indexes (blue-green)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Search Index
2. Click Swap Indexes
3. Verify swap completed
Expected Result: Active and inactive indices swapped successfully

Title: Cancel index build
Steps:
1. Start index build
2. Click Cancel
Expected Result: Index build cancelled; partial state handled gracefully

Title: Backup indices - select all
Steps:
1. Navigate to Search Index
2. Select All indices
3. Click Backup
Expected Result: All selected indices backed up successfully

Title: Backup indices - select one
Steps:
1. Select single index
2. Click Backup
Expected Result: Selected index backed up successfully

Title: Refresh search index blade after build
Steps:
1. Build index
2. Click Refresh
Expected Result: Index blade refreshed showing updated status and counts

Title: Create product then refresh index
Steps:
1. Create new product
2. Navigate to Search Index
3. Refresh
Expected Result: New product reflected in index after rebuild/refresh

Title: Delete product then rebuild index
Steps:
1. Delete a product
2. Rebuild index
3. Search for deleted product
Expected Result: Deleted product no longer appears in search results

Title: Cancel indexation task in progress
Steps:
1. Start full indexation
2. Click Cancel task
Expected Result: Indexation cancelled; system stable

Title: Swap indexes then build and refresh
Steps:
1. Swap indexes
2. Build index
3. Refresh blade
Expected Result: Index swap and rebuild completes correctly; blade shows updated state

Title: Full indexation (Elastic Search module)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Search > Elastic Search
2. Run full indexation
3. Verify completion
Expected Result: Full indexation completed; all entities indexed

Title: Index concrete entity
Preconditions: Elastic Search module installed; specific entity exists
Steps:
1. Select specific entity type (e.g. Product)
2. Run indexation for that entity
Expected Result: Only selected entity type indexed

Title: Index update on entity changes
Steps:
1. Modify an entity (e.g. update product)
2. Run incremental index update
Expected Result: Changed entities re-indexed correctly

Title: Build index in Elastic Search module
Steps:
1. Navigate to Elastic Search
2. Click Build
Expected Result: Index built successfully

Title: Delete and rebuild index
Steps:
1. Click Delete + Build
2. Wait for completion
Expected Result: Old index deleted; new index built from scratch

Title: Cancel Elastic Search build
Steps:
1. Start build
2. Click Cancel
Expected Result: Build cancelled gracefully

Title: Index product and search
Steps:
1. Index products
2. Search for a specific product by name
Expected Result: Product found in search results after indexation

Title: Filtered search for products
Steps:
1. Index products
2. Perform filtered search (e.g. by category or attribute)
Expected Result: Products matching filter criteria returned

Title: Index and search contacts
Steps:
1. Index contacts
2. Search for a specific contact
Expected Result: Contact found in search results

Title: Apply single TermFilter
Steps:
1. Execute search with single TermFilter parameter
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Results filtered by single term correctly

Title: Apply multiple TermFilters (AND logic)
Steps:
1. Execute search with multiple TermFilter parameters
2. Verify AND logic applied
Expected Result: Only products matching ALL term filters returned

Title: Apply OrFilter
Steps:
1. Execute search with OrFilter
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Products matching ANY of the OR conditions returned

Title: Apply AndFilter with nested OrFilter
Steps:
1. Execute search with AndFilter containing nested OrFilter
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Complex filter logic applied correctly

Title: Apply NotFilter
Steps:
1. Execute search with NotFilter
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Products NOT matching the filter criteria returned

Title: Apply RangeFilter (greater than)
Steps:
1. Execute search with RangeFilter (greater than value)
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Only products with property value greater than threshold returned

Title: Apply RangeFilter (between)
Steps:
1. Execute search with RangeFilter (lower and upper bounds)
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Only products with property value within range returned

Title: Filter on nested property
Steps:
1. Execute search filtering on nested property path
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Filter applied correctly on nested property

Title: Settings - token filter and gram configuration
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Search
2. Configure Token Filter
3. Set Min Gram and Max Gram values
4. Save
Expected Result: Search settings saved; tokenization uses configured gram values

Title: Settings - maximum fields in index
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Search
2. Set maximum number of fields in an index
3. Save
Expected Result: Setting saved; index respects field limit

Title: Settings - schedule indexing jobs
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Search
2. Enable Schedule Indexing Jobs
3. Set cron expression
4. Save
Expected Result: Indexing job scheduled with configured cron expression

Title: Settings - enable scale-out indexing
Steps:
1. Enable scale-out indexing
2. Set maximum queued indexing jobs
3. Save
Expected Result: Scale-out indexing enabled with configured job limit

Title: Scalable indexation verification
Steps:
1. Configure scalable indexation partitions
2. Run indexation with x2 scaling
3. Verify product schema and partitioning
Expected Result: Scalable indexation completes correctly; products searchable across partitions
